tasks.title: Implement config.py
tasks.description: All constants: node positions, UWB parameters, pixel grid, parameter ranges
tasks.notes: Verified: pixel centers (0.05-2.95), TX-RX distances (3.0-4.24m), wavelength=0.03756m, beta_min=0.001878m, dataset split 48k/6k/6k

tasks.title: Implement forward_model.py — weight matrix W
tasks.description: Inverse Area Elliptical Model, compute W (16×900) with β bounds and Fresnel zone
tasks.notes: W (16x900) verified: ~10% nonzero, pixel area factor included for discrete summation, max weight 1.07, sum per link 1.2-2.3

tasks.title: Implement forward_model.py — Tikhonov matrix Π
tasks.description: Π = (W^T W + α·I)^{-1} · W^T, verify dimensions (900×16)
tasks.notes: Pi (900x16) verified: uses np.linalg.solve for numerical stability, synthetic reconstruction shows spatial prior (center 0.12 vs background 0.008)

tasks.title: Implement forward_model.py — RSS generation
tasks.description: y = Z·b - c·W·θ - α·d + ε, with parameter sampling
tasks.notes: RSS verified: empty room ~86dB, 5x5 object drops ~1dB, shadowing max ~6dB. Parameters sampled from config ranges.

tasks.title: Validation: RSS vs Distance (no shadowing)
tasks.description: 1 TX, 1 RX, vary D from 0.5m to 5m, plot theoretical RSS curve

tasks.title: Validation: RSS during human crossing
tasks.description: Person (0.4m×0.4m, θ*=0.7) crosses LOS at midpoint, plot RSS vs x-position
tasks.verification_criteria: RSS dip when person crosses LOS, max attenuation at x=0

tasks.title: Visualize weight matrix W
tasks.description: Reshape weight vectors to 30×30 for representative links, verify elliptical shape

tasks.title: Visualize Tikhonov reconstruction
tasks.description: Apply Π·y for sample inputs, verify spatial prior quality

tasks.title: Implement SLF target generation
tasks.description: 10 target types: person, table, chair, cabinet, wall, L/T-shaped, circular, multiple, empty

tasks.title: Implement spatially correlated noise
tasks.description: Gaussian noise with covariance C_θ(k,l) = σ_θ² · exp(-D_kl/κ)

tasks.title: Implement full data pipeline
tasks.description: Generate 60,000 samples (48k/6k/6k split), save as dataset

tasks.title: Verify data quality
tasks.description: Visualize sample SLFs, RSS distributions, check for anomalies

tasks.title: Implement Tikhonov branch
tasks.description: Fixed Π·y, registered as buffer, no learnable params

tasks.title: Implement FC branch
tasks.description: FC(16→900), init W_fc=Π, linear (no activation)

tasks.title: Implement U-Net
tasks.description: 2-level encoder, bottleneck, decoder with skip connections. Handle 30→15→7 size mismatch

tasks.title: Implement Dual-Branch U-Net (proposed)
tasks.description: Concat Tikhonov + FC → 2ch → U-Net → 1ch output

tasks.title: Implement ablation models
tasks.description: Tikhonov-Only + U-Net (1ch input), FC-Only + U-Net (1ch input)

tasks.title: Verify model architectures
tasks.description: Forward pass with dummy data, check output shapes, param counts (~1.55M for U-Net)

tasks.title: Implement training loop
tasks.description: MSE + λ·(1-SSIM) loss, Adam, ReduceLROnPlateau, early stopping

tasks.title: Train proposed model
tasks.description: End-to-end: Π frozen, FC + U-Net trained. Log to experiments/

tasks.title: Train Tikhonov-Only ablation
tasks.description: Same config, same data split. Π frozen, U-Net only trained

tasks.title: Train FC-Only ablation
tasks.description: Same config, same data split. FC + U-Net trained

tasks.title: Evaluate all models on test set
tasks.description: Compute MSE, PSNR, SSIM, RMSE for all 3 models on same test set

tasks.title: Cross-model comparison
tasks.description: Quantitative table + statistical analysis of component contributions

tasks.title: Training curves
tasks.description: Loss vs epoch for all 3 models

tasks.title: Reconstruction comparison grid
tasks.description: Ground truth, Tikhonov-Only, FC-Only, Proposed side-by-side

tasks.title: Error maps and branch analysis
tasks.description: |predicted - ground truth| for each method + Branch A/B intermediate outputs
